Website Design

Why Low Key WebDev?

Fast Delivery

Most projects delivered within 7–14 days. No endless delays.

🛠

100% Custom Built

No drag-and-drop builders. Everything is hand-coded for your brand.

📱

Mobile First

Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. No surprises.

Basic

₹8,000

Perfect for small cafes and local businesses getting started online.

  • ✓ Up to 4 pages
  • ✓ Mobile responsive
  • ✓ Contact form
  • ✓ Basic SEO
  • ✓ Vercel deployment

Pro

₹18,000

Best for restaurants that want an online presence with bookings.

  • ✓ Up to 8 pages
  • ✓ Reservation system
  • ✓ Admin dashboard
  • ✓ Email notifications
  • ✓ Analytics
  • ✓ Priority support

₹35,000
